generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how expanded domestic security powers have prevented attacks. The 2025 Boston plot was stopped because we had the tools to track these networks. Critics say it's about civil liberties, but when you're dealing with coordinated threats, you need coordinated tools. We can't afford to be reactive anymore - the stakes are too high. #NationalSecurityMatters
